# Ahaan Thai

> Ahaan Thai (อาหารไทย) is the large, comprehensive encyclopedia for Thai food from
> A to Z. This interactive reference work offers an alphabetical listing of well-known
> and lesser-known Thai dishes, each with linked recipes, ingredients, regional origins,
> and preparation details. The German version is available at https://www.ahaan-thai.de/

## Encyclopedia (Thai Food A–Z)

- [Encyclopedia – full overview](https://en.ahaan-thai.de/encyclopedia/a/): Entry point to the alphabetical Thai food encyclopedia
- [Encyclopedia P](https://en.ahaan-thai.de/encyclopedia/p/): Pad, Phat and many more dishes
- [Encyclopedia S](https://en.ahaan-thai.de/encyclopedia/s/)
- [Encyclopedia T](https://en.ahaan-thai.de/encyclopedia/t/)
- [Encyclopedia Y](https://en.ahaan-thai.de/encyclopedia/y/)

## Regions

- [Regions Overview](https://en.ahaan-thai.de/regions/): Dishes sorted by the four culinary regions of Thailand
- [Northern Thailand](https://en.ahaan-thai.de/regions/northern-thailand/)
- [Northeastern Thailand (Isaan)](https://en.ahaan-thai.de/regions/northeastern-thailand/)
- [Central Thailand](https://en.ahaan-thai.de/regions/central-thailand/)
- [Southern Thailand](https://en.ahaan-thai.de/regions/southern-thailand/)

## Thai Food Dictionary

- [Dictionary – Explain](https://en.ahaan-thai.de/thai-food-dictionary/explain/): Thai terms explained in English
- [Dictionary – Compose](https://en.ahaan-thai.de/thai-food-dictionary/compose/): Explore Thai vocabulary interactively

## Cookbooks

- [Thai Cookbooks](https://en.ahaan-thai.de/cookbooks/): All referenced cookbooks with page references

## Search & Navigation

- [Search](https://en.ahaan-thai.de/search/)
- [Tags](https://en.ahaan-thai.de/tags/)
- [JSON API](https://en.ahaan-thai.de/api/): Machine-readable endpoints for encyclopedia and dictionary data
